QBM.CompositionApi.NodeDev Namespace

One Identity Manager API Server
 
Classes
  ClassDescription
DbAppInfoProvider
Service class to lookup information about the html apps present in the database.

The base information is queried from the QBMHtmlApp database table.

A crucial information about an app is its name. Because that name is not stored in QBMHtmlApp it will be retrieved from the package.json file for the application. That file should be stored in the database table QBMFileRevision with a QBMFileRevision.FileName value of package.json prefixed by the path of the application which is stored in the column QBMHtmlApp.Path.

NodeAppInfo
PackageInfo
PlugInInfo
Interfaces
  InterfaceDescription
IAppInfoProvider
Returns information about NodeJS applications declared in the system.
IStaticContentInfoProvider
